case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF VS GUZMAN EDUARDO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $972.09 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE AS TO DEFENDANT GUZMAN EDUARDO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-02-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GUZMAN EDUARDO $972.09 PRINCIPAL, $19.29 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $991.38 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT GUZMAN EDUARDO
